channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Archipelago Client
item.description: A simple integration of Vintage Story with Archipelago Multiworld Randomizer.

item.title: Quivers and Sheaths Fork
item.description: 1.22 Fork

item.title: Overhaul lib legacy compatibility
item.description: Compat for firearms, crossbows, combatoverhaul

item.title: BetterEr Prospecting
item.description: Altered prospecting experience with focus on reducing randomness

item.title: GlobalSRVCore
item.description: A collection of modified and altered mods for the GlobalSRV project server.

item.title: RequiresTraitFix
item.description: Fixes the requiresTrait recipe property never being synced for non-grid recipes

item.title: Eidolon Unchained
item.description: Adds a walking Eidolon with multiple devastating attacks.

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: AoS Steward addition (Faction armor)
item.description: A set of clothing and armor options made for the Steward faction on Age of Saraph

item.title: BLACK HORN
item.description: Adds different color horns, charlotte made the original shapes, just color changed

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Capreolinae
item.description: A collection of New World deer from the Holocene.

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Pantherinae
item.description: A collection of big cats from human history.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: Easy Alcohol Distilling Fork
item.description: Easy Alcohol Distilling

item.title: Compatibility Ecosystem Flora
item.description: Supports for any participants in ecology patches

item.title: Handbook Turbo
item.description: Speeds up my servers handbook! Should work with other servers

item.title: Icebox
item.description: A vintage icebox, place a block of ice inside and it will keep your food fresh.

item.title: IRDP's Wet Crops Mod
item.description: Adding a few new moisture-heavy crops to the game. Compat with Paddy Fields.

item.title: Obsidiancraft
item.description: Adds new obsidian items, including crude arrows, saws, scythes, macuahuitl and tepoztopilli

item.title: Смарагдове небо - Emerald sky
item.description: A content mod for Vintage Story that adds one new craftable tuning cylinder with a ukrainian song.

item.title: Prospector's Dispatch
item.description: Stop aimlessly wandering the wilderness searching for that resource you need.

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: WeatherStory
item.description: static barometric orographic directional wind/precipitation/fire sim via bands, seasons, hemispheres

item.title: CollapseStory
item.description: Adds structural and material physics to building blocks, and greatly expands beam functionality.

item.title: Mechanical Fix
item.description: A server-side fix for mechanical networks that reduces the risk of freezes and errors.

item.title: Overlap Claims
item.description: A server-side mod that allows overlapping claims and makes nested claim management more flexible.

item.title: Forest Regeneration
item.description: A server-side mod that gradually restores cut-down forests within their original natural boundaries.

item.title: Wapiti Flute Extend
item.description: A server-side flute extension for reliably recalling tamed wapiti even from unloaded chunks.

item.title: VS Exporter
item.description: VS Exporter is a server-side Vintage Story mod that exposes server metrics over HTTP for Prometheus
